case_title: PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. STEVEN GOMEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, STEVEN $8,169.14 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,469.14, SEE SCANNED DOC

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, STEVEN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-14-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-21-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66005097) AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, STEVEN
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 66005097) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (COURT JUDGMENT) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, STEVEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65873125), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-16-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-16-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, STEVEN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65975776) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
